Ediz Tiyansan

Copied

The Los Angeles Coliseum has already hosted two Summer Olympic Games in 1932 and 1984. Now preparations are underway to host again in 2028.

Our correspondent Ediz Tiyansan has spoken to officials at the Los Angeles Coliseum and logistical experts about the preparations and challenges.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.

title: Los Angeles gears up for the 2028 Summer Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: The Los Angeles Coliseum has already hosted two Summer Olympic Games in 1932 and 1984. Now preparations are underway to host again in 2028. Our correspondent Ediz Tiyansan has spoken to officials at the Los Angeles Coliseum and logistical experts
